headline: Georgia Power encourages customers to prepare for hurricane season
summary: The Atlantic hurricane season is here and runs through Nov. 30. Georgia Power is encouraging customers to take simple steps now to protect their families, homes and businesses. Hurricane season can bring heavy rain, strong winds and flooding to both coastal and inland communities.

headline: Time to start looking at value and industrials after strong run up, says Hennessy Funds' Ryan Kelley
summary: Ryan Kelley, Hennessy Funds CIO, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the year's market drivers, how investors should allocate and much more.
